arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Espanyol (4-3-3) : Courtois; Carvajal, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy; Bellingham, Modric, Valverde; Rodrygo, Mbappe, Vinicius. Real Madrid will aim to extend their winning streak to four games in all competitions when they battle Espanyol in La Liga on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Espanyol, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Espanyol in what should be a manageable home game for Los Blancos, who earned a solid 3-1 win against Stuttgart last Tuesday. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Militao, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Vinicius, Rodrygo, Mbappe.
